title: Plan and monitor intensive production systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and monitor intensive production systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Source information for input to production system planning

pcs.text: Consult livestock production plan for details of current period planning, workplace requirements and market expectations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult livestock production plan for details of current period planning, workplace requirements and market expectations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult livestock production plan for details of current period planning, workplace requirements and market expectations.

pcs.text: Analyse key production data to establish unit performance

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse key production data to establish unit performance.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and analyse information regarding the characteristics of the livestock under production.

pcs.text: Access and analyse regulatory, industry and workplace requirements that impact on the production system

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and analyse regulatory, industry and workplace requirements that impact on the production system.

pcs.text: Access and analyse market information regarding quality, standards and trends for input to the planning process

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and analyse market information regarding quality, standards and trends for input to the planning process.
